```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.55em;">

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:5em 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border-left:4px solid #2C8475;text-align:left;">
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">kind 01</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Plugins</div>
   </div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:0.3em;">Marketplace bundles via <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;font-size:0.95em;">/plugin</code></div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">everything-claude-code</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">claude-plugins-official</span>
    </div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:5em 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-left:4px solid #C4881A;text-align:left;">
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">kind 02</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">MCPs</div>
   </div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:0.3em;">External servers as tools</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">Excalidraw</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">Figma</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">Gmail</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">Calendar</span>
    </div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:5em 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-left:4px solid #5654A2;text-align:left;">
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">kind 03</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">Skills</div>
   </div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:0.3em;">tw93's <strong style="color:#5654A2;">Waza</strong></div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/think</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/design</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/hunt</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/check</span>
     <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">/learn</span>
    </div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
